message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for ReduceMin and ReduceMax

Adds 31 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Full reduction (all axes) and single/multi-axis reduction
- Negative values and mixed sign handling
- Infinity cases (+/- inf)
- NaN handling (IEEE 754-2008 minNum/maxNum semantics)
- Integer type support (i64)
- Shape verification and min/max relationship tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
